name: SHENANDOAH TELECOMMUNICATIONS CO/VA/
summary: Our Company Shenandoah Telecommunications Company and its subsidiaries (Shentel, we, our, us, or the Company), provide broadband services through its high speed, state-of-the-art fiber-optic and cable networks to customers in eight contiguous states in the eastern United States. The Companys services include: broadband internet, video and voice; high-speed Ethernet, dark fiber leasing; and managed network services.
